flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Jose City College fell 34% between 2009 and 2010 (12.2% → 8.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Jose City College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($588 → $762).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at San Jose City College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.5k → $11.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Jose City College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.0k → $3.5k).
